Verity Thornquist is the founder of Fernwheel. Verity shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

Fernwheel is a seed-stage company. Founded by Verity Thornquist. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Quick one — does Tuesday work for the sync?
By the way, someone named Ingrid Felbrook emailed about partnerships. Never heard of them.
